Personnel

Noah Stoneman — piano, Rhodes (1–4, 8, 9)
Eden Ladin — piano, synth (5, 6)
Steve Cardenas — guitar (1–3, 5, 6)
Ben Meigners — upright bass, electric bass

William West — drums (4, 8)
Café Da Silva — percussion (3, 4, 8)
